meta.title: Cycling Zone · the browser cycling manager where strategy beats spending
meta.description: Build a team, bid on riders in live auctions, set your tactics, and race a full season. A free, browser-based cycling manager game. No pay-to-win.

hero.title: A cycling manager built for the long game.
hero.subtitle: Build your team, bid on riders in live auctions, and make every call across a full season. Climb the divisions, right in your browser.

signature.sampleNote: Sample data. Live standings update as the race unfolds.

rows.title: Build your team
rows.body: Pick a roster that fits your strategy. Climbers for the mountains, sprinters for the flat, a captain to build around.
rows.data: Lead a full roster, not just a star

rows.title: Bid in live auctions
rows.body: Compete for riders in real-time auctions against other managers. Read the room, time your bid, do not overpay.

rows.title: Develop your riders
rows.body: Train your riders to sharpen their strengths, and bring young talent up through your academy. Today's prospect can become next season's star.
rows.data: A youth academy to grow your own stars

rows.title: Set your tactics
rows.body: Pick your captain, send riders up the road, and decide who chases and who saves their legs for the finish.

rows.title: Race the season
rows.body: Follow your team through stage races and one-day races across a full season, then build for the next season.
rows.data: Race your way up the divisions

different.title: Built on one promise
different.fairness: The game must be fair for everyone. Real money can't buy better riders, faster training, or better results.

cards.title: Shaped by the community
cards.body: One developer, building in public. Your feedback decides what gets built next, and every change ships where you can see it.

cards.title: Free to play
cards.body: The full game is free. Sign up, build a team, and compete without paying for anything that affects the outcome.

cards.title: No install
cards.body: It runs in your browser, on your phone or your laptop. Nothing to download, nothing to update.

discord.title: The game is built in the open
discord.body: Cycling Zone started as one idea: a cycling manager where you don't just click through numbers, but actually build something over a season. I'm making it on my own, in the open, season by season. The Discord is where I share what I'm working on before it ships, where new managers get a hand finding their feet, and where your feedback decides what I build next. It's not finished, and it gets better every week. You come for the racing. You stay for the people. Bring your team, share your thoughts, and help shape where it goes.

waitlist.title: Get the launch email
waitlist.body: Leave your email, and I'll send you one message when the next season starts. No newsletter, no noise.
waitlist.consentBefore: I agree to be contacted about the launch and accept the
waitlist.disclaimer: One email at launch. Unsubscribe any time.
waitlist.successBody: Thanks. I'll email you once when the next season starts. In the meantime, the Discord is the best place to follow along.

errors.emailInvalid: That email does not look right.
errors.consent: Please accept the privacy policy to continue.
errors.duplicate: You are already on the list.
errors.rls: Something blocked the sign-up. Please try again.
errors.network: Network error. Please check your connection and try again.
errors.unknown: Something went wrong. Please try again.

items.a: Yes. The full game is free to play. You can sign up, build a team, and compete against other managers without paying for anything.
No. Real money can't buy results. The best manager wins, not the biggest spender.
Cycling Zone is in open beta now, with a fresh season opening soon. Join the Discord or leave your email, and I'll let you know the moment it starts.

items.q: Do I need to install anything?
items.a: No. It runs in your browser on desktop and mobile. There is nothing to download.
